zh.Elmsall, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾艾爾姆薩爾
zh.Wentworth Woodhouse, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾溫特沃思 伍德豪斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan le Tyes於1285年之後出生在英國越可爾波瓦利斯時，她的父親Richard Le Tyas8750歲，母親Alice de Tankersly8744歲。她於1325年之前與John Wentworth在英國越可爾艾爾姆薩爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1373年在英國越可爾艾爾姆薩爾。

zh-hans.Wentworth Woodhouse, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾溫特沃思 伍德豪斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan le Tyes于1285年之后出生在英国越可爾波瓦利斯时，她的父亲Richard Le Tyas8750岁，母亲Alice de Tankersly8744岁。她于1325年之前与John Wentworth在英国越可爾艾爾姆薩爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1373年在英国越可爾艾爾姆薩爾。

nameMeanings.name: Tyes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of   Tice  . This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Tice
meanings: English: variant of Teece , Tye , or Tyas. The latter is an ethnic name from Anglo-Norman French t(i)eis, tiais ‘Teuton, German’, denoting someone from Germany or the Low Countries, or occasionally a habitational name from Thiais in Val-de-Marne, France.
Americanized form of German   Theiss   or possibly   Theus  .
Americanized form of Dutch and Flemish Thys or of its variants Thijs (Dutch and Flemish) and Tijs (Dutch).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: le
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan le Tyes was born after 1285, in Burghwallis, Yorkshire, England, her father, Richard Le Tyas, was 8750 and her mother, Alice de Tankersly, was 8744. She married John Wentworth before 1325, in Elmsall, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died about 1373, in Elmsall, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan le Tyes est née après 1285, à Burghwallis, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Richard Le Tyas, avait 8750 ans et sa mère, Alice de Tankersly, avait 8744 ans. Elle a épousé John Wentworth avant 1325, à Elmsall, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1373, à Elmsall, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan le Tyes nach 1285 in Burghwallis, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Le Tyas 8750 und ihre Mutter Alice de Tankersly 8744. Sie hat vor 1325 in Elmsall, Yorkshire, England John Wentworth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb um 1373 in Elmsall, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan le Tyes è nata il dopo il 1285 nel Burghwallis, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Richard Le Tyas, aveva 8750 anni e sua madre, Alice de Tankersly, aveva 8744 anni. Lei sposato John Wentworth prima del 1325, nel Elmsall, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1373, nel Elmsall, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan le Tyesが1285年以後にイギリスヨークシュアイアブルグhワリスで生まれた時，父Richard Le Tyasは8750歳，母Alice de Tankerslyは8744歳であった。1325年以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアエルムサルでJohn Wentworthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1373年にイギリスヨークシュアイアエルムサルで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan le Tyes(이)가 1285년 이후 영국 요르크실르 버그h월리스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Le Tyas(은)는 8750세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Tankersly(은)는 8744세였다. 그녀는 1325년 이전 영국 요르크실르 엘사에서 John Wentworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1373년 영국 요르크실르 엘사에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan le Tyes nasceu após 1285, em Burghwallis, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Le Tyas, tinha 8750 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Tankersly, tinha 8744 anos. Ela casou-se com John Wentworth antes 1325, em Elmsall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1373, em Elmsall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan le Tyes родилась после 1285 г. в местности бургваллис, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Le Tyas было 8750 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Tankersly, 8744. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Wentworth перед 1325 г. в местности элмсалл, еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла около 1373 г. в местности элмсалл, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan le Tyes nació después de 1285, en Burghwallis, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Le Tyas, tenía 8750 años y su mamá, Alice de Tankersly, tenía 8744 años. Se casó con John Wentworth antes de 1325, en Elmsall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió aproximadamente 1373, en Elmsall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
